backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend canister placeholder with no implemented methods.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping the 'Subjects' section feature to its implementation in App.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing short summaries of the three main frontend source files: index.css, tailwind.config.js, and App.tsx.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using a neutral color palette.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app, setting the page title to '10th Science Academy' and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component for the 10th Science Academy site, featuring a red header with navigation, hero section, a six-subject card grid, stats bar, features grid, CTA, and footer.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom React hook and context provider managing Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file importing Google Fonts (Merriweather and Inter) and defining the academy's red (#d9002c) OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom fonts (Merriweather, Inter), OKLCH color tokens, card shadows, and fade-in/pulse-ring keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the project state (version 5) for the '10th Science Academy' static website, including existing features (header, welcome section, visual theme, subjects section) and two pending new feature requests.
